highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “A Failed Breakdown of today’s 6370 daily low is always of interest.” I also wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the two Failed Breakdowns (Thursday and Friday) that represented the institutional accumulation prior to the Friday squeeze.
For yesterday, that key support was 6461.
The range is mostly 6461-6494 with a magnet at 6474 but this will expand and morph.

post_title: SPX Has Gone Nowhere For Two Weeks. Is The Coil Ready To Break? August 27 Plan
